channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Utah HC loses on late goal to Islanders, 2-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Mathew Barzal scored with 1:25 left in regulation and the New York Islanders defeated the Utah Hockey Club 2-1 at Delta Center on Saturday. The forward found a rebound off a scrum in front of the net and lifted it over a sprawling Connor Ingram from the right circle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up at the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Australian Open: Olympic champ Zheng Qinwen starts her bid for another final on a rainy Day 1
item.description: Olympic champion Zheng Qinwen made the most of the indoor conditions under a roof at Rod Laver Arena to advance to the second round of the Australian Open in straight sets while it poured with rain outside.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Deion Sanders criticizes Travis Hunter for deactivating social media after online comments about fiancée
item.description: Colorado Buffaloes head football coach Deion Sanders addressed his former player Travis Hunter's decision to deactivate social media accounts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 2 Auburn rallies past South Carolina 66-63, standout Johni Broome exits with left ankle injury
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Tahaad Pettiford assisted on Dylan Cardwell's go-ahead dunk and converted two free throws with 4.4 seconds remaining as No. 2 Auburn overcame an injury to leading scorer Johni Broom and rallied to beat South Carolina 66-63 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eli Manning shares his dad's funny texting habit in social media post
item.description: Former New York Giants quarterback Eli Manning posted his father's text message to social media and exposed Archie's funny texting habit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cooper Flagg scores ACC freshman record 42 points as No. 4 Duke beats Notre Dame 86-78
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Cooper Flagg scored an Atlantic Coast Conference freshman record 42 points to help No. 4 Duke hold off Notre Dame 86-78 on Saturday and stay unbeaten in conference play.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JD Vance jokes about skipping inauguration to watch Ohio State in title game
item.description: Vice President-elect JD Vance will have to watch his Ohio State Buckeyes battle for a national title in Washington as they are scheduled to play the same day as the inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn impresses skiing into 6th place in her first World Cup downhill race since 2019
item.description: ST ANTON, Austria (AP) — Six years later it's “Wow, Lindsey, wow!” The racecourse commentator broadcasting Lindsey Vonn's first World Cup downhill race since 2019 — the American is age 40 and has a titanium knee — summed up how impressive the ski great's performance was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Another rough night for UCLA coach Mick Cronin: This time his ire was directed at the officials
item.description: COLLEGE PARK, Md. (AP) — Three days after ripping his team following a home loss to Michigan, UCLA coach Mick Cronin turned his disdain toward the officials.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Wings hold off Blackhawks 5-3 for 6th straight victory
item.description: Alex DeBrincat and Lucas Raymond each had a goal and an assist and the Detroit Red Wings won their sixth straight game, beating the Chicago Blackhawks 5-3 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rose Bowl half-marathon and 5K postponed due to wildfires
item.description: The annual Rose Bowl half-marathon and 5K, originally scheduled for Jan. 19, has been postponed as wildfires continue to ravage the Los Angeles area.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vince McMahon reaches deal with SEC over hush money agreements
item.description: McMahon, according to the SEC, failed to inform WWE's board of directors and legal and financial departments of the settlement agreements.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Utah HC loses to Stanley Cup champs, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club continues to struggle at home, losing its fourth straight game at the Delta Center Wednesday night to the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears interview Mike Vrabel for head coaching position; Iowa State's Matt Campbell also comes up, report says
item.description: The Bears interviewed former Tennessee Titans head coach Mike Vrabel for their head coaching job on Wednesday, which was not unexpected. But a name from the college ranks that has now come up, according to a Chicago Tribune report, certainly wasn't on the radar of NFL coaching carousel pundits.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Outdoor hockey is coming to Florida. The NHL will have games in Miami and Tampa next season
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Hockey. Outdoors. In Florida. Next season, the NHL is making it happen — twice. The NHL announced Wednesday that the Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers will play host to the New York Rangers at loanDepot Park in Miami — home of baseball’s Marlins — on Jan.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jazz lose on half-court shot at the buzzer
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz' attempt at its first three-game winning streak of the season ended in heartbreaking fashion. Trae Young hit a buzzer-beating 3-pointer from beyond the halfcourt line to give the Atlanta Hawks a 124-121 victory over the Jazz on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes drop fourth straight to #3 Iowa State, 82-59
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes gave #3 Iowa State a game, but the Cyclones overpowered the Utes down the stretch for an 82-59 victory, handing the Utes their fourth straight defeat. Curtis Jones had 23 points off the bench to lead Iowa State to its 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State cracks the top-25 rankings
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a 14-1 start, the Utah State basketball team is back in the top-25. The Aggies check in at No. 25 in both the AP Top 25 and USA Today Coaches Poll. Utah State is 4-0 in Mountain West play, under first-year USU head coach Jerrod Calhoun.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs with Bowles celebrates another division title with dose of caution for playoff rematch
item.description: For the fifth consecutive season, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers will enter the NFL postseason, their fourth straight time as champions of the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: About four hours after the Colts completed their season with a 26-23 overtime victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars, Irsay ended any speculation about possible offseason changes by announcing in a letter to fans that longtime general manager Chris Ballard and second-year coach Shane Steichen would r
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Browns fire offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and O-line coach Andy Dickerson after 3-14 season
item.description: Hours after finishing 3-14 with a loss in the finale of a season that was expected to carry into the playoffs, Cleveland coach Kevin Stefanski fired offensive coordinator Ken Dorsey and offensive line coach Andy Dickerson.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5
